SettingsPaymentHistoryDescription: View past transactions and payment records.
SettingsSubscriptionDescription: Manage your active subscriptions and recurring payments.
SettingsWalletDescription: Link your digital wallet for quick payments and payouts.
SettingsWithdrawalDescription: Configure how you receive payouts for completed tasks.
AcceptableUseAccountIntegrityDescription: Users must maintain one account. Creating multiple accounts to claim tasks or manipulate the system results in permanent suspension.
AcceptableUseCodeQualityDescription: All submitted pull requests must be original work. Automated or AI-generated code must be disclosed in the PR description.
AcceptableUseConductAutomated: Using automated tools or bots to interact with the platform without prior written authorization
AcceptableUseConductDescription: The following conduct is strictly prohibited on PrTask and may result in immediate enforcement action:
AcceptableUseConductDiscrimination: Engaging in discriminatory, hateful, or threatening behavior toward any user based on race, gender, religion, nationality, disability, or any other protected characteristic
AcceptableUseConductExploiting: Exploiting platform vulnerabilities, APIs, or payment systems for unauthorized gain
AcceptableUseConductFakeTasks: Creating fake tasks or pull requests to artificially inflate earnings or manipulate payment flows
AcceptableUseConductInauthentic: Engaging in coordinated inauthentic behavior including shill bidding, fake reviews, or rating manipulation
AcceptableUseConductIpViolation: Violating the intellectual property rights of others, including submitting code that infringes copyrights or patents
AcceptableUseConductKycCircumvent: Circumventing or attempting to circumvent KYC verification requirements
AcceptableUseConductMalicious: Distributing, hosting, or linking to malicious software, phishing pages, or exploit kits
AcceptableUseConductMoneyLaundering: Using the platform to facilitate money laundering, terrorism financing, or any violation of the Anti-Money Laundering Act (RA 9160)
AcceptableUseConductUnauthorizedAccess: Attempting to access other users' accounts, data, or payment information without authorization
AcceptableUseContactDescription: For questions about this Acceptable Use Policy, contact abuse@prtask.com. For legal inquiries, contact legal@prtask.com.
AcceptableUseContentModerationDescriptio: In compliance with the EU Digital Services Act (DSA) 2022/2065, PrTask maintains transparent content moderation policies. Users may flag illegal or harmful content through our reporting mechanism. PrTask processes notices from "trusted flaggers" with priority. PrTask provides a statement of reasons for every content moderation decision, offers an internal complaint handling mechanism, and provides access to out-of-court dispute settlement for users affected by moderation decisions. PrTask publishes annual transparency reports on content moderation activities and decisions. PrTask prohibits dark patterns in content moderation interfaces and ensures that algorithmic decision-making is subject to human review.
AcceptableUseDescriptionParagraph1: This Acceptable Use Policy establishes the rules of conduct for all participants in the PrTask marketplace. It defines prohibited activities including plagiarism, spam, leaderboard manipulation, payment fraud, harassment, and other behaviors that undermine the integrity of the platform. These rules exist to protect the community and ensure that PrTask remains a trustworthy environment for both developers seeking paid work and clients seeking quality code contributions.
AcceptableUseDescriptionParagraph2: Enforcement actions range from warnings to permanent account termination depending on the severity and frequency of violations. PrTask employs both automated detection and manual review to identify policy violations, and provides an appeal process for users who believe enforcement actions were applied in error. All users are expected to maintain professional conduct, submit original work, and comply with applicable laws regarding financial transactions, intellectual property, and anti-money laundering regulations.
AcceptableUseEnforcementAppeal: PrTask reserves the right to take enforcement action at its sole discretion. Users subject to enforcement action may appeal by contacting abuse@prtask.com within 14 days of the action. PrTask will provide a statement of reasons for every content moderation decision as required by the EU Digital Services Act.
AcceptableUseEnforcementContentText: Removal of offending tasks, pull requests, or other content
AcceptableUseEnforcementDescription: Violations may result in account suspension, bounty forfeiture, and permanent ban from the platform.
AcceptableUseEnforcementFinancialText: Freezing of account funds pending investigation of financial violations
AcceptableUseEnforcementLegalText: Reporting of criminal activity to law enforcement authorities, including the AMLC for suspected money laundering
AcceptableUseEnforcementSuspensionText: Suspension of account access for a defined period (7 to 90 days)
AcceptableUseEnforcementTerminationText: Permanent removal from the platform with forfeiture of pending bounties
AcceptableUseEnforcementWarningText: A formal notice identifying the violation and requiring corrective action
AcceptableUseIntroduction: This Acceptable Use Policy governs your conduct on the PrTask platform. All users, including clients and developers, must comply with this policy. Violations may result in enforcement actions including account suspension or termination. This policy complies with the EU Digital Services Act (DSA) content moderation requirements.
AcceptableUseProhibitedCollusion: Colluding with other users to manipulate task outcomes or artificially inflate earnings
AcceptableUseProhibitedDescription: Users must not use PrTask to submit plagiarized code, spam tasks, manipulate leaderboard rankings, or engage in fraudulent payment activities.
AcceptableUseProhibitedFraud: Engaging in fraudulent payment activities or payment manipulation
AcceptableUseProhibitedHarassment: Harassing, threatening, or intimidating other users
AcceptableUseProhibitedImpersonation: Impersonating another user or misrepresenting your identity
AcceptableUseProhibitedLeaderboard: Manipulating leaderboard rankings or achievement badges through artificial means
AcceptableUseProhibitedLowQuality: Intentionally submitting low-quality work to collect bounties
AcceptableUseProhibitedMalware: Uploading malware, viruses, backdoors, or malicious code
AcceptableUseProhibitedMoneyLaundering: Using the platform to launder money, finance terrorism, or facilitate illegal transactions
AcceptableUseProhibitedPaymentCircumvent: Attempting to circumvent the automatic payment system
AcceptableUseProhibitedPlagiarism: Submitting plagiarized, stolen, or unlicensed code in pull requests
AcceptableUseProhibitedScraping: Scraping or automated data collection from the platform without authorization
AcceptableUseProhibitedSpam: Spamming tasks, pull requests, or platform communications
AcceptableUseReportingDescription: If you observe any activity that violates this Acceptable Use Policy, please report it to abuse@prtask.com. Include the username of the offending party, a description of the violation, and any supporting evidence such as links or screenshots. All reports are reviewed within 2 business days. PrTask protects the identity of reporters and prohibits retaliation against anyone who submits a good-faith report.
AccessibilityAdaComplianceDescription: PrTask is committed to compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) and equivalent international accessibility standards. We regularly audit our platform to ensure that all users, including those with disabilities, can access and use our services effectively. Our goal is to meet or exceed WCAG 2.1 Level AA requirements across all pages and features.
AccessibilityConformanceDescription: PrTask targets conformance with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 at Level AA, which is the standard referenced by the European Accessibility Act, the US ADA (Title III), and Section 508. We regularly audit our platform against these guidelines and remediate any identified gaps. Our conformance status is partially conformant, meaning we conform to most but not all WCAG 2.2 Level AA success criteria, and we are actively working to achieve full conformance.
AccessibilityDescriptionParagraph1: This Accessibility Statement documents PrTask's commitment to making the platform usable by everyone, including people with disabilities. We target WCAG 2.2 Level AA conformance and comply with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA), the European Accessibility Act (EAA), and other regional accessibility requirements. Our accessibility measures include semantic HTML markup, sufficient color contrast ratios, full keyboard navigation support, responsive design, text alternatives for non-text content, dark mode, clear focus indicators, and minimum interactive target sizes.
AccessibilityDescriptionParagraph2: PrTask actively works to identify and address accessibility barriers. If you encounter any accessibility issues while using the platform, we encourage you to contact us so we can resolve them promptly. We regularly audit our platform against WCAG 2.2 criteria and prioritize fixes for any conformance gaps. Our goal is to ensure that all users — regardless of ability — can create tasks, browse opportunities, submit pull requests, manage payments, and participate fully in the PrTask developer marketplace.
AccessibilityEaaDescription: PrTask complies with the European Accessibility Act (EU) 2019/882, effective June 28, 2025, and the harmonized standard EN 301 549 V3.2.1. This requires that our website and web applications conform to WCAG 2.1 Level AA at minimum for users in the EU. PrTask is committed to meeting the updated WCAG 2.2 Level AA standard as the EN 301 549 V4.1.1 standard is adopted. We apply these accessibility standards to all users regardless of their geographic location.
AccessibilityFeedbackDescription: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of PrTask. If you encounter any accessibility barriers, have suggestions for improvement, or need assistance accessing any part of our platform, please contact us at accessibility@prtask.com. We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within 5 business days and will work to resolve reported issues promptly. You may also request content in alternative formats. For complaints regarding accessibility that are not resolved to your satisfaction, you may contact the relevant national enforcement body in your jurisdiction.
AccessibilityKnownLimitationsDescription: While we strive to ensure accessibility across our platform, some third-party content or newly added features may not yet fully meet all WCAG 2.1 Level AA criteria. We are actively working to identify and resolve any accessibility gaps.
AccessibilityMeasureColorContrast: Sufficient color contrast ratios between text and background
AccessibilityMeasureDarkMode: Dark mode and light mode support respecting OS preferences
AccessibilityMeasureFocusIndicators: Clear focus indicators on all interactive elements for keyboard navigation
AccessibilityMeasureKeyboard: Keyboard navigable interface for all interactive elements
AccessibilityMeasureResponsive: Responsive design that works across devices and screen sizes
AccessibilityMeasureSemantic: Semantic HTML markup for proper screen reader navigation
AccessibilityMeasureTargetSize: Minimum interactive target size of 24x24 CSS pixels
AccessibilityMeasureTextAlternatives: Text alternatives for non-text content where applicable
